stemHtml: In aviation, what distinguishes icing on the ground from icing in the air?

options.a: Icing on the ground results in larger ice accumulation compared to icing in the air.
options.b: Icing on the ground and in the air have no significant differences.
options.c: Due to kinetic heating, airflow, and other factors, ice accumulation is different between icing on the ground and in the air.
options.d: Icing in the air tends to be more severe than icing on the ground.
